title: Echoing Chorus
description: Adds Echoing Chorus Fruit, items that return the user to their spawn point, crafted with echo shards and chorus fruit. A useful endgame utility.
body:
# Echoing Chorus

![An image of the recipe and use stages of Echoing Chorus Fruit.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa2e2721f52f484ceff2d18940243d54a341d733_0.webp)

## Overview

This mod adds Echoing Chorus Fruit, an endgame utility item which teleports its user back to their spawnpoint. The fruit is crafted out of four Echo Shards and one Chorus Fruit and slowly breaks when used. After it has fully shattered, the fruit can be repaired with another Chorus Fruit. This means that Echo Shards are not lost, but a new Chorus Fruit is needed after every few uses.

## Contents

As of the initial release, this mod contains:

- **Echoing Chorus Fruit**, an endgame utility item to return the user home crafted from **Echo Shards** and **Chorus Fruit**.
- **Chipped Echoing Chorus Fruit**, returned after using an **Echoing Chorus Fruit**.
- **Cracked Echoing Chorus Fruit**, returned after using a **Chipped Chorus Fruit**.
- **Shattered Echoing Chorus Fruit**, returned after using a **Cracked Chorus Fruit**. **Shattered Echoing Chorus Fruit** can be repaired with a fresh **Chorus Fruit**.
